description: Poll an HTTP endpoint and trigger a run when a targeted slice of the response changes (json_path / regex / css_selector / strip_patterns).

outputs.description: RunRequest when the targeted-slice hash changes vs the cursor

asset_keys.label: Asset Keys
asset_keys.description: Asset keys to materialize when the response changes.

headers.label: Headers
headers.description: Optional HTTP headers (use env-var values for secrets).

json_path.label: JSON Path
json_path.description: Dotted path into a JSON response (e.g. 'scoreboard.gameDate'). Hashes the value at that path.

regex_extract.label: Regex Extract
regex_extract.description: Regex pattern; hashes the concatenation of all matches (groups concatenated).

css_selector.label: CSS Selector
css_selector.description: CSS selector (e.g. 'div.scores'). Hashes the text content of all matching elements. Requires beautifulsoup4.

strip_patterns.label: Strip Patterns
strip_patterns.description: Regexes to REMOVE from the body before hashing. Use to strip known noise (timestamps, ad slots, nonces).

name: HttpPollSensor
